commands_run: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git rev-parse HEAD
rg for argparse and CLI patterns
sed reads of tts generate, stt eval schema/cli/runner, zonos2 README/tests
tests_not_run: No pytest/unittest suites run by request: read_only_analysis and no heavyweight tests.
data_accessed: Repo source and metadata only under <repo>
git status, branch, commit, ls-files, check-ignore
claims: pyproject uses setuptools package discovery with include = ['mlx_audio', 'mlx_audio.*']; normal packages need __init__.py to be discovered.

mlx_audio/research/zonos2_youth directories already exist but are empty and have no __init__.py, so setuptools.find_packages does not currently include mlx_audio.research or mlx_audio.research.zonos2_youth.
CLI convention is argparse with main(), optional argv in newer eval CLI, and console scripts named as dotted module paths.
Recommended CLI location: mlx_audio/research/zonos2_youth/cli.py with main(argv=None), plus __main__.py for python -m support.
Schema style favors stdlib dataclasses, pathlib.Path, Mapping metadata, and JSON/JSONL artifacts; avoid adding pydantic.

.gitignore currently ignores output/ and *.safetensors only. It does not ignore outputs/, audio-cache/, raw audio extensions globally, checkpoints directories, *.pt, *.pth, *.ckpt, *.onnx, *.gguf, or research artifact directories.
There are already tracked wav fixtures/examples in the repo, so new ignore rules should preserve explicit fixtures/examples rather than blanket-remove existing assets.
Worktree was already dirty before inspection: mlx_audio/tts/generate.py and mlx_audio/tts/models/zonos2/model.py are modified.
known_risks: Empty research directories are not tracked by git and will not ship unless files such as __init__.py are added.
Adding a console script without package markers would likely fail after packaging.
Broad *.wav ignores could hide legitimate small test fixtures; prefer scoped artifact directories plus explicit fixture exceptions if needed.
Unstaged diffs in modified runtime files may affect integration details.
integration_notes: Add mlx_audio/research/__init__.py and mlx_audio/research/zonos2_youth/__init__.py before relying on imports or packaging.
Follow stt/eval for research runner shape: schema.py, cli.py, runner.py, JSONL predictions, summary.json, summary.txt, output_dir creation, skip-existing behavior if long-running.
Use argparse rather than click/typer; no new CLI dependency is needed.
Tests should avoid model downloads and heavyweight MLX generation; use tiny dataclasses, tmp_path files, fake models, and mocked generation paths.
Consider scoped .gitignore additions for outputs, audio-cache, artifacts, checkpoints, and heavyweight model/checkpoint extensions.
